title: What it actually looks like to be strong and humble at the same time
caption:
Most men have it backwards. Hard on others. Soft on themselves.

Christ modeled it the other way. Strong enough to flip tables. Gentle enough to weep. First to take the cost of leadership. Quick to extend grace to the people around him.

Strength isn't volume — it's going first into the cost. Humility isn't weakness — it's teachability. The man who can hold both is the man under God's authority, and that's where the confidence actually comes from.

"God opposes the proud but gives grace to the humble." — James 4:6

Save this for the brother who mistakes hard for strong.

#faith #christianmen #leadership #godlymen #manofgod #humility #strength #christianity #james4
theme: He's hard on himself, gentle with others.
